resources.string: Something went wrong. Please try again.
No internet connection. Showing cached data.
You\'re offline. Some data may be outdated.
I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Account locked. Try again in %1$d minute(s).
Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
Draft recovered. Continue where you left off?
Help reduce food waste in your community
View and track your pickup requests
Complete your profile to unlock all features
Goal reached! Great work this week.
%1$d more to reach your weekly goal
Waiting for %1$s to prepare your request
Reject request from %1$s? Quantity will be restored.
Mark as ready for pickup? %1$s will be notified.
Are you sure you want to cancel this pickup request?
You must accept the Terms of Service to continue
No messages yet. Start the conversation!
Clearing food waste, one chain at a time
This item is active and ready to be distributed.
This item has been distributed successfully.
This item has expired — dispose of properly.
Could not detect location. Use search or buttons below.
Could not get location. Enable GPS.
You have a saved draft. Would you like to continue from where you left off?
Let\'s set up your profile so you can start donating food.
Let\'s set up your profile so you can start receiving donations.
Help us connect you with nearby partners.
e.g. Back door, ask at service counter
Upload business registration or NGO certificate (optional, speeds up verification)
Your profile is complete. Start creating food listings and help reduce waste in your community.
Your profile is complete. Browse and request surplus food from stores near you.
Disputes are reviewed within 48 hours. Provide as much detail as possible.
Fill in the details below to list your surplus food.
Not set — add operating hours in your Profile
Help us keep the platform safe and reliable.
Please confirm all items before approving:
Select a template reason or write a custom one:
Transactions will appear here when requests are created
Optionally record how many people received this food:
Confirm that \"%1$s\" has been distributed to beneficiaries?
Explain why the organization is rejected
Take a photo or choose from gallery to confirm pickup
Submit this photo as proof of pickup?
This will notify the NGO that their request has been rejected.
This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted.
Try adjusting your search or filters
Organizations will appear here when they register
Switch filter to see other organizations
Requests from NGOs will appear here
Browse food listings to make your first request
Create your first listing to get started
Tap the heart on any listing to save it
Try increasing your distance or check back later
Items will appear here after pickup confirmations
%1$d listing(s) expiring within 3 days. Act fast to avoid waste.
NGO confirmed pickup with photo proof
Your organization is under review. You\'ll be notified once approved (usually 1–3 business days).
Verification rejected. Contact support to resolve this and re-submit.
Back door, ask at service counter…
AI will analyze the food and auto-fill details for you
Complete all checklist items to confirm pickup
No messages yet. Start the conversation.
Your request is ready to pickup.
All items are within their expiry date
Account locked. Try again in %1$d minute(s).
AI suggestions applied! Please review and adjust.
Dispute submitted. Our team will review within 24 hours.
Your request was rejected by the grocery
Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
Organization name is valid and complete
Business registration or charity status verified
Incomplete documentation — please resubmit with all required fields
Organization address could not be verified
Name must be at least 3 characters
Password must be 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, and number
Title must be at least 3 characters
End time must be after start time
Failed to save. Please try again.
Please fill in all required fields
Tap a date to filter · tap again to clear
Pickup date cannot be in the past
Pickup date cannot be after expiry date (%1$s)
